ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "tweet_length" INTEGER /* Length of the tweet in characters */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for Android, Twitter Web App) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Sentiment polarity score of the tweet */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who posted the tweet */,
  "tweet_url" TEXT /* The URL of the tweet */,
  "tweet_language" TEXT /* The language in which the tweet was written */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* The type of tweet (e.g., original tweet, reply, retweet) */,
  "tweet_in_reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* The ID of the user who was replied to in the tweet */,
  "tweet_in_reply_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* The ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "tweet_quote_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the tweet was quoted */,
  "tweet_reply_count" INTEGER /* The number of replies to the tweet */,
  "tweet_engagement_score" REAL /* A calculated score representing the engagement level of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* A label indicating the sentiment of the tweet (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "topic_model" TEXT /* The topic model used to categorize the tweet (e.g., LDA, NMF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the user */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user follows */,
  "profile_bio" TEXT /* Bio or description in the user's profile */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location specified in the user's profile */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* The URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "user_header_picture_url" TEXT /* The URL of the user's header picture */,
  "userVerified" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user is verified */,
  "user_default_profile" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user has a default profile */,
  "user_default_profile_image" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user has a default profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Twitter for Android, Twitter Web App) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the hashtag has been used */,
  "first_used" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was first used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was last used */,
  "hashtag_popularity_score" REAL /* A calculated score representing the popularity of the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_sentiment_label" TEXT /* A label indicating the sentiment of the hashtag (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" TEXT /* ID of the hashtag used in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Sports, Technology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_category" TEXT /* The category of the topic (e.g., sports, technology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "topic_id" TEXT /* ID of the topic associated with the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* The name of the role (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* The date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* The name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* The data included in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* The date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
